response.global_analysis:
1. Song & Lyrics Match: Identified the first song as 'Nonsense' (ナンセンス) by Chinozo and the second song as 'Kokkara' (こっから) by SixTONES, composed by SAEKI youthK. Transcribed the Japanese lyrics and dialogue manually with high phonetic and grammatical accuracy.
2. Translation: Provided rich, context-aware English translations for both songs' lyrics and the dynamic conversation segment in the middle.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each block strictly to the start and end of vocalizations to prevent cascading delays, splitting rapid-fire lines and managing fast transitions smoothly.

subtitles.original: Dirty dirty night
subtitles.english: Dirty dirty night.

subtitles.original: 右も左もどん詰まり

subtitles.original: 気の毒ね
subtitles.english: What a pity,

subtitles.original: 暴れ 暴れ
subtitles.english: run wild, run wild!

subtitles.original: Can't you understand?
subtitles.english: Can't you understand?

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah Yeah yeah Yeah yeah Yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah...

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah Yeah yeah Yeah yeah Yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah...

subtitles.english: Ladies and gentlemen, nonsense,

subtitles.english: No room for empty comfort,

subtitles.original: 黙れ 黙れ 黙れ
subtitles.english: shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: この世はナンセンス
subtitles.english: This world is nonsense,

subtitles.original: はなからナンセンス
subtitles.english: nonsense from the very start!

subtitles.original: 気休めなかれ
subtitles.english: No room for empty comfort,

subtitles.original: 黙れ 黙れ 黙れ
subtitles.english: shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: まもなく時間です
subtitles.english: Time is almost up,

subtitles.original: 誠にカンゲキです
subtitles.english: truly spectacular!

subtitles.original: お気は済んだ？
subtitles.english: Are you satisfied now?

subtitles.original: 下がれ 下がれ
subtitles.english: Back off, back off,

subtitles.original: くたばれ
subtitles.english: and drop dead!

subtitles.original: ほら 精々 散々 行ってらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Now, do your best and get lost!

subtitles.original: 満身創痍 散々 散っていきな
subtitles.english: Covered in wounds, just fade away!

subtitles.original: Rest in Peace
subtitles.english: Rest in peace,

subtitles.original: ご冥福を
subtitles.english: my deepest condolences,

subtitles.original: 来世で逢おう
subtitles.english: see you in the next life,

subtitles.original: See you again
subtitles.english: See you again.

subtitles.original: うわ！びっくりした、危な！
subtitles.english: Whoa! You scared me, that was close!

subtitles.original: 危ないじゃないですか！
subtitles.english: That's dangerous, you know!

subtitles.original: 何？その動き。お前、ダンサー？
subtitles.english: What are those moves? Are you a dancer?

subtitles.original: え？ダンサーですけど。
subtitles.english: Huh? Yes, I am a dancer.

subtitles.original: うわっ、私も！ダンサーです！
subtitles.english: Whoa, me too! We're dancers!

subtitles.original: えっ、なんかすごいダンサーがいっぱい出てきた！
subtitles.english: Whoa, a bunch of awesome dancers just appeared!

subtitles.original: ちょっ、えっ？
subtitles.english: Wait, what?

subtitles.original: なんかつら、はじめちゃんダンスのオーディション落ちちゃってさ
subtitles.english: It's so sad... Hajime-chan failed the dance audition.

subtitles.original: もしかして、あそこのシアターですか？
subtitles.english: By any chance, was it at that theater over there?

subtitles.original: そう！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: え？それ私も落ちました！
subtitles.english: What? I failed that one too!

subtitles.original: えー！僕も！私も！私も！みんな落ちた仲間？！
subtitles.english: What?! Me too! Me too! Me too! So we all failed together?!

subtitles.original: うん！ねー！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Right?!

subtitles.original: あのミニ番長審査員センスないよね！
subtitles.english: That mini-bancho judge has zero taste, right?!

subtitles.original: ねー！ほんとに！信じられない！ねー！
subtitles.english: Exactly! Seriously! Unbelievable! Right?!

subtitles.original: こちらのダンス、ちゃんと見せつけてやろうじゃ！
subtitles.english: Let's show them what our dancing is really made of!

subtitles.original: おー！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: もう壁とは踊らないぞ！一席いくよっ！
subtitles.english: I won't just dance with walls anymore! Let's start the show!

subtitles.original: 3メートルの覇気！こぼ・かなえる！
subtitles.english: Three meters of Haki! Kobo Kanaeru!

subtitles.original: カオスに満ちる、ハコス・ベールズ！
subtitles.english: Filled with chaos, Hakos Baelz!

subtitles.original: 宇宙一の番長になる！轟はじめ！
subtitles.english: Becoming the number one bancho in the universe! Todoroki Hajime!

subtitles.original: よし！うちらの始まりは...
subtitles.english: Alright! Our beginning starts...

subtitles.original: こっから！！！
subtitles.english: From here!!!

subtitles.original: えー、皆さん、いくぞ！
subtitles.english: Alright everyone, let's go!

subtitles.original: Hey! 1, 2, 1, 2... 産声を上げな 行き先はこうだ
subtitles.english: Hey! 1, 2, 1, 2... Cry out your birth cry! This is our destination!

subtitles.original: 生真面目いかが？如何様にして勝つ？
subtitles.english: How about some earnestness? How will you win?

subtitles.original: 深く深く眠る凝り固まる感情を剥がせますか？
subtitles.english: Can you peel away the deep-seated, frozen emotions?

subtitles.original: 知るか乗るか反るかしかめっ面世の中
subtitles.english: Who cares, take a chance, sink or swim, in this frowning world,

subtitles.original: 確かな価値観の泥沼から
subtitles.english: stuck in a swamp of fixed values.

subtitles.original: 怒鳴ったってこの葛藤で
subtitles.english: Even if I scream, through this inner conflict...

subtitles.original: 生まれたて己の格闘で生きよう
subtitles.english: I'll live fighting with my newly born self!

subtitles.original: 空いた穴を埋めたいの？ 愛の？愛の？
subtitles.english: Do you want to fill the void? With love? With love?

subtitles.original: この不協和音を愛したいの？したいの？
subtitles.english: Do you want to love this dissonance? Do you?

subtitles.original: これだけじゃやれねぇって分かってる
subtitles.english: I know I can't make it with just this,

subtitles.original: でもこれしかねぇからこれにかかってる
subtitles.english: but this is all I have, so everything depends on it.

subtitles.original: 間違ってる未来でも俺には光ってる
subtitles.english: Even if it's a mistaken future, it shines for me.

subtitles.original: Ready, fire!
subtitles.english: Ready, fire!

subtitles.original: 燃やすこの闘志 その手透かし
subtitles.english: Burning this fighting spirit, seeing through it,

subtitles.original: ぶっ壊したってどうしようもないままが自分なんだ
subtitles.english: even if I break it down, this helpless self is who I am!

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: It all starts from here!

subtitles.original: いつかの等身もって努力し
subtitles.english: Striving with the stature of that future self,

subtitles.original: 夢と相思相愛になれるはずなんだ
subtitles.english: we're bound to fall in mutual love with our dreams!

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: It all starts from here!

subtitles.original: 1 2 3 4 順番通り
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, 4, in perfect order,

subtitles.original: 言ってらんないだけで予定通り
subtitles.english: just unable to say it, but everything is on track.

subtitles.original: Rollin' Rollin' 転がって行けよ
subtitles.english: Rollin', Rollin', keep on rolling on,

subtitles.original: Yoly Yoly 緑の一生
subtitles.english: Yoly, Yoly, a life of green.

subtitles.original: 1 2 3 4 順番通り
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, 4, in perfect order,

subtitles.original: 言ってらんないだけで予定通り
subtitles.english: just unable to say it, but everything is on track.

subtitles.original: Rollin' Rollin' 転がって行けよ
subtitles.english: Rollin', Rollin', keep on rolling on,

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: It all starts from here!

subtitles.original: ええ こっからこっから
subtitles.english: Yeah, from here, from here!

subtitles.original: わからんだって 燃料にすれば すっからかん
subtitles.english: If we use our confusion as fuel, we'll run completely dry!

subtitles.original: カラッカンを落下ンスカンスカン 奴はまさに難関
subtitles.english: A dry can falling down, down, down, that guy is truly a major obstacle!

subtitles.original: 一人になりたくても人だらけ されど気立つのは一苦労なワケ
subtitles.english: Even if I want to be alone, it's crowded, but standing out is quite a chore.

subtitles.original: 惹かれたくないされどピープル
subtitles.english: I don't want to draw attention, yet we're people,

subtitles.original: でもどこいたって ピポピポピポ
subtitles.english: but wherever we go, it's beep-beep-beep!

subtitles.original: キーはC、ずっとC
subtitles.english: The key is C, always C,

subtitles.original: 四苦八苦した先は荒れたレッドカーペット
subtitles.english: and past all the struggles lies a rough red carpet.

subtitles.original: ハハ、たりらりらりらだった、カモン！
subtitles.english: Haha, it was just nonsense, come on!

subtitles.original: よりどり緑ってさっき言ったろ？
subtitles.english: Didn't I just tell you there's plenty of green?

subtitles.original: アップダウンと無風 心の雨雲
subtitles.english: Ups and downs with no wind, the rain clouds in my heart,

subtitles.original: 生きたる事が生きてる証拠
subtitles.english: simply living is proof of being alive!

subtitles.original: しかし悔しさで黒く燃える腹ん中
subtitles.english: Yet, inside my stomach burns a dark frustration.

subtitles.original: 燃やせ！燃やせ！燃やせ！
subtitles.english: Burn it! Burn it! Burn it!

subtitles.original: 燃やすこの闘志 その手透かし
subtitles.english: Burning this fighting spirit, seeing through it,

subtitles.original: ぶっ壊したってどうしようもないままが自分なんだ
subtitles.english: even if I break it down, this helpless self is who I am!

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: It all starts from here!

subtitles.original: いつかの等身もって努力し
subtitles.english: Striving with the stature of that future self,

subtitles.original: 夢と相思相愛になれるはずんだ
subtitles.english: we're bound to fall in mutual love with our dreams!

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: It all starts from here!

subtitles.original: 1 2 3 Let's go!
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, Let's go!
